problem id: 67372eaf
category: bit_manipulation

rule: ROT(5)

examples:
  10100000 -> 00010100
  10011100 -> 10010011
  00110011 -> 01100110
  01010111 -> 11101010
  00111100 -> 10000111
  01101000 -> 00001101
  00001001 -> 00100001
  00010000 -> 00000010

query: 01000011
predicted answer: 01101000
